words.def: any maneuver made as part of progress toward a goal
words.zh: n. 步驟, 步, 步幅, 腳步聲, 踏級, 步伐, 短距離, 步態, 手段, 等級

words.def: a domesticated animal kept for companionship or amusement
words.zh: n. 寵物, 受寵愛的人, 寵壞的孩子, 不悅, 生氣

words.def: a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used
words.zh: n. 日落, 同夥, 組合, 集合, 裝置
